articles.title: Canara Bank hands over ₹2,397 crore dividend cheque to FM Nirmala Sitharaman
articles.description: Canara Bank delivers ₹2,397 crore dividend to FM Nirmala Sitharaman after reporting a record ₹19,187 crore net profit.

articles.title: India's resilience amid energy crisis a model of governance: Kant
articles.description: Amitabh Kant, former NITI Aayog CEO, said India's handling of the global energy crisis is a model of governance. He stated that early policy action, diplomatic efforts, and digital tools ensured normal life was not impacted, unlike in other nations.

articles.title: Govt doubles NIIF commitment to Rs 60,000 cr to boost infra build-out
articles.description: The Union Cabinet approved an additional Rs 30,000 crore for the NIIF, doubling the government's total commitment to Rs 60,000 crore. This investment aims to accelerate infrastructure build-out in key sectors like transport, energy, and digital.

articles.title: Push for private participation in critical minerals sector took place during LDF rule: Satheesan
articles.description: UDF claims private participation in Kerala's critical minerals sector began under LDF rule, emphasizing past decisions by KMML.

articles.title: Skyborn acquires full ownership of 111MW Nordergründe wind farm
articles.description: Before the transaction, Skyborn held a 30% stake in Nordergründe, with the remaining 70% owned by different investors.

articles.title: Yes Bank to raise up to ₹16,000 crore through equity, debt issue
articles.description: Yes Bank said the fundraising would not result in more than 10% dilution of existing shareholders' stake

articles.title: July power bills cheaper by 4.43% in Uttar Pradesh as FPPAS turns record negative
articles.description: Uttar Pradesh electricity consumers will see a welcome 4.43% reduction in their July power bills, the largest monthly benefit in 14 months. This comes thanks to a negative Fuel and Power Purchase Adjustment Surcharge (FPPAS), reflecting lower actual power purchase costs. The Uttar Pradesh Electricity Regulatory Commission's directive ensures this relief benefits all consumer categories across the state.

articles.title: Yamuna Water Project: Haryana, Rajasthan ink pact for surplus water
articles.description: Haryana and Rajasthan signed a historic agreement to end a 30-year deadlock over Yamuna water. The pact facilitates the transport of surplus water from Haryana's Hathnikund Barrage to Rajasthan via pipeline for drinking water needs.

articles.title: Industrial production grows 5.1% in May; BoB cautious on full year
articles.description: A Bank of Baroda report projects a cautious full-year outlook for India's industrial production, citing delays in supply chain normalization. Despite a 5.1% growth in May 2026, the report warns that full recovery will take several months.

articles.title: Delhi's power demand hits all-time high of 8,748 MW amid heatwave
articles.description: Delhi's power demand set a new record of 8,748 MW amid a severe heatwave. Distribution utilities, including Tata Power-DDL, have successfully managed the surge through advance planning, technology, and ensuring an uninterrupted supply.

articles.title: Yes Bank to raise up to $1.7 billion via equity, debt issue
articles.description: Yes Bank is poised to raise up to ₹160 billion through a strategic mix of equity and debt offerings. The board has approved an equity issuance of as much as ₹75 billion alongside a debt issuance reaching ₹85 billion. This approach is designed to strengthen the bank’s capital framework while minimizing dilution for current shareholders and adhering to regulatory standards.

articles.title: Modi government plans major action on petrol and diesel as West Asia crisis nears end, sale restrictions will now be...
articles.description: Modi government plans major action on petrol and diesel as West Asia crisis nears end, sale restrictions will now be...

articles.title: Delhi's peak power demand hits new all-time high of 8,748 MW
articles.description: Delhi recorded its highest-ever peak power demand of 8,748 MW, surpassing the previous all-time high of 8,656 MW. BSES discoms met the demand, and SLDC projections indicate the peak demand may cross 9,000 MW this summer.

articles.title: Saks Global exits Chapter 11 as Exemplar Luxury Group
articles.description: ELG intends to grow its position in US multi-brand luxury retail through a model spanning physical stores, digital commerce and remote selling channels.

articles.title: Monsoon delay, competition may hit urad farming
articles.description: Area under urad cultivation was down nearly 40% year-on-year as of June 19, according to government data

articles.title: India's 1st Offshore Airport To Come Up In Maharashtra: Impact On Economy
articles.description: Maharashtra Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis inspected the layout of the proposed offshore airport.

articles.title: US-Iran war: Moody’s confident India can withstand fiscal deficit target breach without impacting rating
articles.description: Moody's currently rates India at Baa3, the lowest level within the investment-grade category, with a stable outlook. According to de Guzman, the rating reflects the government's consistent progress in strengthening its fiscal position since the Covid-19 pandemic.

articles.title: Beyond weekly expiries: How can SEBI build a market for long-term F&O contracts? Experts say lower margin is key
articles.description: Market participants say without designated market makers, sufficient liquidity, rational margin requirements and an enabling regulatory framework, longer-dated products are unlikely to achieve meaningful scale.

articles.title: HAL announces final dividend of Rs 10 for FY26. Check record date and other details
articles.description: HAL has declared a final dividend of Rs 10 per share (200%) for FY26, subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming AGM. The record date is set for August 14, 2026. The payout will be made within 30 days of approval, along with updates on recent financial performance.

articles.title: Chilean retail group Cencosud acquires Makro Colombia
articles.description: The deal will be executed through Cencosud's subsidiary Cencosud Internacional and financed entirely from internal resources.

articles.title: SBI ordered to pay Rs 20 lakh compensation each to sweepers; HC says bread is costlier than blood
articles.description: Ending a 27-year legal fight, the Orissa High Court ordered a public sector bank to pay Rs 20 lakh each to two daily-wage sweepers. The court rejected their plea for service regularisation, citing previous judgments. Judges acknowledged the workers' nearly three decades of service, their advancing age, and limited future employment prospects, deeming the compensation a just resolution.

articles.title: PFC-REC merger approved: What happens to REC shares, swap ratio and shareholders now?
articles.description: Power Finance Corporation and REC Ltd have approved their merger, creating a formidable power sector financing entity with over Rs 11 lakh crore in loans. REC shareholders will receive 88 PFC shares for every 100 REC shares held. This consolidation aims to bolster the balance sheet, enhance operational efficiency, and support India's energy transition and infrastructure development, pending regulatory approvals.

articles.title: 72% women entrepreneurs use UPI, but only 37% invest in tech tools: Study
articles.description: UPI adoption is rising among women entrepreneurs, but their digital finance journey is also expanding into credit, investments and tech

articles.title: Persistent Systems shares selloff: Should you buy, sell or hold the stock after 10% crash?
articles.description: Persistent Systems shares fell 10% after announcing the Nagarro acquisition. Here's why analysts remain divided, the key risks, strategic benefits and the latest brokerage target prices.

articles.title: Global bond funds flock to India after tax relief measures, aiding rupee
articles.description: Overseas investors have stepped up purchases of Indian govt bonds after Centre scrapped taxes on debt investments and relaxed ownership limits, improving market's appeal and supporting capital inflows

articles.title: EPFO 3.0 may make PF withdrawals easier, but should you use it?
articles.description: EPFO's planned digital upgrade could make provident fund withdrawals much quicker. But easier access to your savings doesn't always mean withdrawing money is the right financial decision

articles.title: PFC slips after board clears REC merger; share swap fixed at 88:100
articles.description: Power Finance Corporation (PFC) declined 1.75% to Rs 425.10, while REC edged up 0.08% to Rs 364.95 after the boards of both state-owned lenders approved their long-awaited merger scheme.

articles.title: Good for business – or profit at any cost? The controversial side of private equity – a visual explainer
articles.description: While it can transform firms for better or worse, the use of private equity in essential services is attracting scrutiny. Here we examine some of its more contentious elements in the UK veterinary sector Private equity could be the two most controversial words in business. For its supporters, it can bring investment, expertise and efficiency to a company. For critics, it is a one way ticket to profiteering, cutting costs and losing staff. The arguments over private equity are particularly fierce when it is used in the public sector, particularly the NHS. Continue reading...

articles.title: Aurobindo Pharma nears all-time high, up 30% in 4 months; more upside left?
articles.description: Aurobindo Pharma stock hit a 52-week high at ₹1,585, and quoted close to its record high of ₹1,592 hit in September 2024. HDFC Securities maintains 'Add' rating on the stock.

articles.title: CSM Technologies IPO enters final day: GMP signals 4% listing gains; Should you subscribe?
articles.description: CSM Technologies' IPO is nearing its close with a modest grey market premium of around 4%, suggesting limited listing gains. The issue, aiming to raise Rs 145.78 crore, was 66% subscribed by Day 2, with retail investors showing strong interest. The company, a digital transformation and GovTech solutions provider, operates in a growing sector but faces valuation concerns and competition.

articles.description: Across brokerages, Coforge and Mphasis remain among the preferred picks, while weak demand, AI-led investments, wage hikes and margin pressures continue to weigh on the broader sector outlook.
